reason: Successfully navigated to the app, found the QA-20260319-000739-ccr0 agent, verified its idle status, sent a math question, and received a correct response containing "4" within 3 minutes.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully with agent list visible in sidebar
Found and clicked the "QA-20260319-000739-ccr0" agent in the sidebar - Agent detail page opened, showing landing page with message input
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" - Agent status showed "idle" in the top bar
Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" - Message typed in input field and send button clicked
Waited up to 3 minutes for response - Response received in 2 seconds with "4." as the answer
Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot - Response clearly shows "4." and agent returned to idle status
